title: Settings types and schema
purpose: Define the typed settings structs that represent the JSON settings schema. These types are the shared vocabulary that the loader (NC-003), merger (NC-003), builder integration (NC-004), and downstream consumers (NC-005) all reference. Landing the types first allows NC-003 to import them without a circular dependency.
task: Create norn::config::types with NornSettings and all sub-structs: ProviderSettings, AgentSettings, RetrySettings, PermissionSettings, HookSettings, HookEntry, ToolSettings, WriteToolSettings, McpServerSettings, SkillsSettings, ContextSettings, SessionSettings. All structs derive Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Default with all-None/empty defaults. Duration fields are Option<String> (parsed by humantime at validation time, not at deserialization time).

requirements.title: NornSettings top-level struct
requirements.spec: NornSettings SHALL be the root settings type with optional fields for every configuration section: model, provider, agent, retry, permissions, hooks, tools, mcp_servers, skills, context, session, tui, env.
acceptance: tui field is Option<serde_json::Value> (opaque, reserved for TUI cluster)
Derives Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Default, Clone

requirements.title: ProviderSettings struct
requirements.spec: ProviderSettings SHALL hold provider configuration: base_url, timeout, max_retries, options, auth mode, rate_limit, runner_path, debug_dump_dir.
acceptance: Derives Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Default, Clone

requirements.title: AgentSettings and RetrySettings structs
requirements.spec: AgentSettings SHALL hold agent loop configuration. RetrySettings SHALL hold retry policy configuration. Both use Option<String> for duration fields.
acceptance: AgentSettings defined with fields: max_turns (Option<u32>), step_timeout (Option<String>), schema_budget (Option<u32>), context_window (Option<u64>), compact_threshold (Option<f64>), compact_keep_turns (Option<usize>), reasoning_effort (Option<String>), reasoning_summary (Option<String>), prompt_command_timeout (Option<String>)
RetrySettings defined with fields: max_retries (Option<u32>), base_delay (Option<String>), backoff_multiplier (Option<f64>)
Both derive Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Default, Clone

requirements.title: PermissionSettings struct
requirements.spec: PermissionSettings SHALL hold consent-boundary permission rules with allow, deny, and ask arrays.
acceptance: PermissionSettings defined with fields: allow (Option<Vec<String>>), deny (Option<Vec<String>>), ask (Option<Vec<String>>)
Derives Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Default, Clone
Default yields all-None fields (no default allow/deny rules)

requirements.title: HookSettings and HookEntry structs
requirements.spec: HookSettings SHALL have one field per HookRegistry trait. HookEntry SHALL describe a single hook command with optional matcher and timeout.
acceptance: HookSettings defined with fields: pre_tool (Option<Vec<HookEntry>>), post_tool (Option<Vec<HookEntry>>), pre_llm (Option<Vec<HookEntry>>), post_llm (Option<Vec<HookEntry>>), session_event (Option<Vec<HookEntry>>)
HookEntry defined with fields: matcher (Option<String>), command (String), timeout (Option<u64>)
Both derive Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Default, Clone
HookEntry command is required (not Option) — a hook without a command is invalid

requirements.title: ToolSettings, MCP, Skills, Context, Session structs
requirements.spec: ToolSettings SHALL use namespaced sub-objects for per-tool config. Remaining settings structs SHALL hold their respective configuration fields.
acceptance: ToolSettings defined with fields: write (Option<WriteToolSettings>), bash (Option<serde_json::Value>), edit (Option<serde_json::Value>)
WriteToolSettings defined with fields: max_code_lines (Option<usize>), length_overrides (Option<Vec<LengthOverrideEntry>>)
LengthOverrideEntry defined with fields: pattern (String), limit (usize)

McpServerSettings defined with fields: transport (Option<String>), command (Option<String>), args (Option<Vec<String>>), url (Option<String>), env (Option<BTreeMap<String, String>>), headers (Option<BTreeMap<String, String>>)
SessionSettings defined with fields: cleanup_days (Option<u32>), history_capacity (Option<usize>)
All derive Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Default, Clone

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement loading or parsing logic — that is NC-003
SHALL NOT implement merge logic — that is NC-003
SHALL NOT modify builder.rs — that is NC-004
SHALL NOT add validation logic — that is NC-003
SHALL NOT add Default implementations with filled-in values (Tom's NO ASSUMED DEFAULTS edict)
verification: cargo test -p norn — all tests pass
NornSettings::default() produces all-None/empty fields (verified by test)
NornSettings round-trips through serde_json (verified by test)
Partial JSON (only some fields set) deserialises without error (verified by test)
No file exceeds 500 lines of code (excluding tests, comments, whitespace)
